name: HWM IoT Valve Controlled Water Meter
desc: IoT valve-controlled water meter, NB-IoT/4G, remote valve open/close, flow limiting, IP68 three-chamber, 6+ year battery.
overview: The HWM Valve IoT Water Meter integrates NB-IoT / 4G communication with a built-in motorised valve for remote open/close control. Applications include district water management, leakage detection, automated shut-off for non-payment, and pressure management. Battery powered by high-energy-density Li-SOCl₂, rated for over 6 years of continuous service.

specs.label: Valve control
specs.value: Remote open/close / flow limiting via NB-IoT / 4G

features: NB-IoT/4G network transmission: deep signal penetration, stable, two-way communication with software platform
Anti-interference young-sampling technology filters pipeline vibration and hydraulic hammering; true signal from internal sensor
IP68 rated; fully epoxy-encapsulated; submerged in water normally with stable performance
Ultra-low power Li-SOCl₂ battery with high energy density; battery life up to 6+ years
Integrated motorised valve: remotely open/close valve, limit flow; supports prepayment and auto-shutoff on zero balance
Smart scheduled reading with configurable thresholds and active alerts for abnormal water usage
Real-time alarms: triggers on overflow, backflow, slow leak, and other abnormal flow events
Self-diagnostics: real-time monitoring of battery level and valve status with alerts and data logging
